texto: My knees will not tremble at the sight of a King but I will kneel down before a man of humility.
explicacao: Citação de Princess Maleiha Bajunaid Candao sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “My knees will not tremble at the sight of a King but I will kneel down before a man of humility.” articula reflexao, humility, power em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como power e princes.

texto: I send this message to humankind to accentuate on the goodness of all living beings WHO form an important part of humanity.--Thank you for thinking of me, dear friend. For being concerned about my personal welfare the same way I feel about yours.Thank you for the smile of friendship you always sent my way, the wind has blown it to my direction.The world may proclaim your greatness, but it is your inner character dear great HUMANKIND that touched my soul for we are partners in making this universe a better place to live in.

texto: Every human being has the right to respected for his or her own merits or demerits. Respect their personal right to live according to their preference or submission to their faith. No one should be condemned for choosing a life path even if it something you disapprove. We are not here to condemn but to understand and let the sinners as you say be the responsibility of God. Our task is to prevent more chaos and conflict in this universe. Only kindness can do that.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Princess Maleiha Bajunaid Candao sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “Every human being has the right to respected for his or her own merits or demerits. Respect their…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a fe, compassion, humanity, útil em momentos de humanity e humanity-and-society.
